archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High Contrast - Dark Mode) fused with Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon Accents)
emotional_tone: Futuristic, premium, protective, and highly focused. Linear/Vercel-inspired 'Godly' UI.

typography.notes: Outfit for strong, clean geometric headings that feel technical yet premium. Manrope for highly legible dashboard metrics and body copy. Never use Inter for headings. Keep headings tight with tracking-tight.

layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Mode B: The Control Room Grid. Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout_and_spacing.container_padding: Use generous internal padding for cards (p-6).

surfaces_and_microthemes.header: Crystal Glass Variant. bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10. Sticky top.
surfaces_and_microthemes.dashboard_cards: Neumorphic/Technical blend. Flat solid background (#111111), 1px subtle border (border-white/10), no default shadow. Hover state: subtle lift (-translate-y-1), border-white/20, faint inner glow. Rounded corners: rounded-2xl.
surfaces_and_microthemes.webcam_feed_container: The Tracing Beam Variant. Container must have a glowing edge or technical SVG corner brackets. Overflow-hidden, rounded-3xl, with a glassmorphic overlay for tracking state.
surfaces_and_microthemes.floating_notifications: Glassmorphism. backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#111111]/90 border border-white/10 shadow-2xl.

components.webcam_overlay: HTML5 Video element with a stylish absolute positioned overlay. Add framer-motion SVG crosshairs or an animated Face/Eye tracking box outline that subtly pulses.
components.blink_counter: Use Framer Motion's AnimatePresence for a rolling number effect, or a scale pop on state change. Make the number massive (text-5xl or text-6xl) using Outfit font.
components.real_time_graph: Use Recharts (Shadcn Chart component). Area chart with a gradient fill (e.g., blue to transparent) and a bright glowing stroke. Smooth transitions are critical.
components.status_indicator: A glowing dot next to the status text. Use ping or custom pulse animation. Green for normal, Amber for low blink rate, Red for drowsy.
components.buttons: Shadcn Button, heavily customized. Primary buttons: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 (Swiss Brutalist touch) OR blue/purple gradient for high impact CTA.
components.icons: Use lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react. Clean, consistent stroke widths.

motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for dashboard cards using Framer Motion.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements must have clear hover states. Cards lift slightly, button backgrounds brighten.
motion_and_interactions.chart_animations: Ensure the chart updates seamlessly without full redraws (recharts handles this nicely with data pushes).

hero_background.description: Dynamic abstract background with flowing blue and red colors. Use as hero background on the landing page, heavily darkened with a black overlay (e.g. bg-black/80 or gradient overlay) to allow text readability.

user_avatar.description: User avatar for the dashboard header.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: framer-motion, recharts, lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge.
CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='start-camera-btn').
Use standard raw HTML+Tailwind for the landing page for maximum creative freedom, and customized Shadcn components for the dashboard.
Do not use generic blue buttons everywhere. Follow the color guide for a premium Linear-like feel.
Ensure the chart logic can handle a moving window of data (e.g., last 60 seconds) gracefully.
The webcam feed must not look like a plain video element; overlay grid lines, tracking boxes, or corner accents to achieve the 'health-tech' vibe.
Never use completely transparent backgrounds for the sticky header; use backdrop-blur and a semi-transparent dark color to prevent text clash on scroll.
